caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering sits at a dark desk in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, a white backdrop features a gold star logo and the text "HUSTLE" repeated vertically, while a blue banner above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a black mug displays the logo "TALK OUT LOUD". The man is smiling and laughing, with his expression evolving from a smirk to a wider, open-mouthed laugh as he speaks into the microphone. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist and a gold chain around his neck. Throughout the sequence, he remains in the same position, leaning slightly forward toward the equipment while reacting with amusement.
